extra.auc_note: deletion/insertion curves measured on the TRUE VCS by re-running the real ROM with top-SmoothGrad causes occluded (deletion) / restored (insertion); every point is a genuine emulator re-run. NaN = a genuinely flat experiment.

harness_positive_control.interpretation: corr=1 & precision@k=1 (on a non-degenerate column) ⇒ the scoring harness rewards a faithful map; the SmoothGrad numbers are then a true measurement.

extra.output_note: POSITION/INDEX output — the §1 caveat: the pixel value comes from a discrete sprite column (round/argmax), so there is no differentiable RAM read and SmoothGrad VANISHES (max|attr|=0.16). The oracle has real causal signal here, so SmoothGrad scores near chance — the 'plausible ≠ faithful' contrast; the intervention oracle is the sole truth. Noise smoothing CANNOT manufacture a gradient that does not exist.

sampler_on.note: naive ∂pixel/∂ram ≡ 0 (Prop. prop:zero); the bilinear sampler (tools/xai_si_gradient/si_joystick_gradient.jl) restores a real ∂pixel/∂ram[position_byte] (sampler_position_grad_max>0 = the VANILLA, un-smoothed gradient — the keystone). Reported naive-vs-sampler side by side. Noise smoothing cannot manufacture the naive gradient; and where the sprite SATURATES the triangular-kernel cell (occupancy clamped at 1, locally flat), SmoothGrad's noise-average of the sampler gradient can DENOISE to ~0 (sampler_position_smoothgrad_max) even though the vanilla gradient is alive — an honest smoothing effect, not a vanishing. per_cause_faithfulness_null=true ⇒ the sampler's position byte is not among this game's scored candidate causes, so the per-cause Pearson is null (recorded 0.0 by the shared convention), NOT a genuine zero corr — the keystone (a non-vanishing gradient) still holds on the full 128-byte map.

extra.scales_to_cluster_via: tools/cluster/xai_*.sbatch (E0-3) — batched SOFT-STE SmoothGrad over outputs×causes×games on GPU; the forward is bit-exact to this map.
extra.smoothgrad_sigma_units: raw RAM-byte units (byte∈0..255; σ=8.0 ≈ 3.1% of full scale)
extra.substrate: jutari (Julia) — Zygote SmoothGrad over the RAM tape + TRUE-VCS deletion/insertion re-runs (real-ROM, bit-exact oracle machinery).

triad.S_note: held-out predictive fit: 15/17 held-out do(u) within ε=283.9 (calib=17, fit Δy≈481.641·attr+52.938)
triad.definition: F∧S∧M triad (03_methods.tex sec:triad): F = faithfulness (runner-computed, unchanged); S = held-out predictive sufficiency over a disjoint do(u) split scored on the oracle's bit-exact re-runs; M = |U*|/|U_hat| (true minimal cause set / method-named set).

vanilla_gradient_reference.interpretation: Δpearson = SmoothGrad − vanilla |grad|. ≈0 ⇒ smoothing did NOT change FAITHFULNESS (it denoises the visual map; on a one-hot content read the map is already on the true cause, nothing to denoise; on the vanishing position output both are 0 — smoothing cannot create a gradient).
